# WaterTurbine Documentation

This folder contains project documentation for the current firmware and UI implementation.

## Project Summary

**Platform:** ESP32-P4  
**Display:** 1024x600 LCD (EK79007) with GT911 capacitive touch  
**UI:** LVGL 9.2.2, generated by SquareLine Studio 1.6.0  
**Purpose:** Real-time water turbine parameter monitoring dashboard  

**Current state:** All four UI screens (Main Menu, Gauges, Data, Settings) are functional. Voltage and Ampere are read from an ADS1115 16-bit ADC over I2C with 2-point linear calibration. Power is computed from Voltage × Ampere. Flow Rate is read from a YF-DN50 sensor and RPM from a hall sensor, both via hardware pulse counters (PCNT). A DS3231 RTC provides real-time clock and temperature over I2C. An SD card (FAT32, 1-wire SDIO) logs all sensor data to CSV every 60 seconds. A gauges controller task updates the Gauges and Data screens every 1 second.

## Files

- `IMPLEMENTED_ITEMS.md`: What is implemented right now (hardware, BSP, UI, gauges controller, and current limitations).
- `USAGE_GUIDE.md`: How to build, flash, run, and extend the project.
- `LVGL_ELEMENTS.md`: LVGL screen/widget inventory, runtime update details, and usage examples.

## Source Layout

- `main/` \u2014 Application entry point, gauges controller, UI files
- `peripheral/` \u2014 Board support packages (display, touch, I2C, GPIO)
- `main/ui/` \u2014 SquareLine Studio generated LVGL screens
